inline_comments.message:
You can use build int kotlin function extension to reformat this a bit:
fun encode(frame: WireFrameMessage): ByteBuf = allocator
            .buffer(WireFrameMessage.HEADER_SIZE + frame.payload.size())
            .also {
                it.writeByte(WireFrameMessage.MARKER_BYTE.toInt())
                it.writeByte(frame.versionMajor.toInt())
                it.writeByte(frame.versionMinor.toInt())
                it.writeZero(RESERVED_BYTE_COUNT)
                it.writeByte(frame.payloadType.toInt())
                it.writeInt(frame.payloadSize)
                frame.payload.writeTo(it)
            }
